title: 英文單字與文法
description: 英文基礎選擇題與填空題

questions.question: Choose the word closest in meaning to “purchase”.
questions.explanation: purchase 的意思是購買，最接近 buy。

questions.question: Which sentence is grammatically correct?

options.A: She go to school every day.
options.B: She goes to school every day.
options.C: She going to school every day.
options.D: She gone to school every day.

questions.explanation: 主詞 She 是第三人稱單數，現在簡單式動詞需加 s，因此為 goes。

questions.question: Which words are nouns?
questions.explanation: teacher、book、city 是名詞；quickly 是副詞。

questions.question: Which sentences use the past tense correctly?

options.D: She watched a movie last weekend.

questions.explanation: visited、played、watched 都是正確的過去式；eat 應改為 ate。

questions.question: The plural form of “child” is “children”.
questions.explanation: child 的複數是不規則變化 children。

questions.question: “He are a student” is grammatically correct.
questions.explanation: He 應搭配 is，因此正確句子是 “He is a student.”

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ______ to work by bus every day.
questions.explanation: 主詞 She 是第三人稱單數，現在簡單式使用 goes。

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I have ______ my homework.
questions.explanation: finished 或 done 都可形成合理句意，表示已完成作業。

questions.question: Choose the opposite of “increase”.
questions.explanation: increase 是增加，反義詞可用 reduce，表示減少。

questions.question: Translate into English: 品質管理 = ______.
questions.explanation: 品質管理常譯為 quality management。
